entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where the study on employment and income disparities is conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where Andhra Pradesh is located

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The primary livelihood sector for over 60 percent of the population in Andhra Pradesh

entities.name: EMPLOYMENT
entities.description: A key variable studied for regional disparities in Andhra Pradesh

entities.name: UNEMPLOYMENT
entities.description: A key variable studied for regional disparities in Andhra Pradesh

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: A key variable studied for regional disparities in Andhra Pradesh

entities.name: UNIT LEVEL DATA
entities.description: The type of data used for the empirical results of the study

entities.name: EMPLOYMENT AND UNEMPLOYMENT SURVEYS
entities.description: Surveys conducted by the National Sample Survey Organisation to collect data on rural households

entities.name: NATIONAL SAMPLE SURVEY ORGANISATION
entities.description: The organization that conducted the employment and unemployment surveys

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL WORKERS
entities.description: Individuals employed in the agricultural sector

entities.name: COASTAL REGION
entities.description: An agriculturally developed region in Andhra Pradesh

entities.name: TELANGANA REGION
entities.description: A less developed region in Andhra Pradesh

entities.name: RAYALASEEMA REGION
entities.description: A drought prone region in Andhra Pradesh

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A climatic condition affecting the Rayalaseema region

entities.name: WORK PARTICIPATION RATE
entities.description: The proportion of the labor force that is employed

entities.name: WAGE RATES
entities.description: The rate of pay for workers

entities.name: RESERVATION WAGE RATE
entities.description: The minimum wage at which a worker is willing to accept a job

entities.name: PER CAPITA INCOME
entities.description: The average income per person in a region

entities.name: CAPITAL INTENSIVE AGRICULTURAL SECTOR
entities.description: An agricultural sector characterized by high capital investment

entities.name: NONAGRICULTURAL WORKERS
entities.description: Individuals employed in sectors other than agriculture

entities.name: SELF-EMPLOYED
entities.description: Individuals who work for themselves

entities.name: WEEKLY WAGE EARNINGS
entities.description: The amount earned by workers on a weekly basis

entities.name: MALES
entities.description: Gender group with higher weekly wage earnings

entities.name: HIGHER EDUCATED
entities.description: Education level group with higher weekly wage earnings

entities.name: UPPER CASTE WORKERS
entities.description: Social group with higher weekly wage earnings
